name: F & M Community Bank, National Association
description_short: Community-focused FDIC-insured bank with personal and business banking services across three Minnesota locations, emphasizing personalized service and local relationships.
description_long:
F & M Community Bank, National Association is a regional bank operating as an FDIC-insured institution backed by the full faith and credit of the U.S. Government. The bank maintains three physical locations in Chatfield, Preston, and Rochester, Minnesota, positioning itself as a community-oriented financial institution. Founded on principles of local banking and community growth, the bank emphasizes personal relationships and neighborhood connections as core to its service model.

The bank offers a comprehensive range of banking products and services including personal checking and savings accounts, online banking with secure digital access, debit cards, home loans (mortgages), business loans, and investment services through Cetera Investment Services. They provide personal banking services across retail and mortgage lending functions, commercial and agricultural lending, and business banking solutions. The institution also offers insurance consulting services and maintains a "Summit Club" membership program for customers seeking enhanced banking benefits.

F & M Community Bank distinguishes itself through emphasis on personalized service and local decision-making, with a team of dedicated banking professionals across their locations. The bank highlights testimonials emphasizing attentive service and customized loan solutions, and maintains staff with specific lending specializations including commercial lending, agricultural lending, and mortgage lending. Their leadership, including CEO Dan Christianson and President/COO James W. Oeltjenbruns, operates from the Preston location.

As a regional community bank, F & M Community Bank serves customers seeking traditional banking services with local relationship-based service delivery. However, the bank's geographic limitation to three Minnesota locations restricts accessibility for non-local customers. Like most community banks, they likely have higher fees and lower rates than larger national institutions, and limited digital innovation compared to neobanks, though specific fee structures and rate information are not disclosed on their website. Many banks offer installment loans with fixed monthly payments, giving borrowers a clear payoff timeline.
services: Online banking with secure digital access
Debit cards linked to checking accounts
Insurance consulting and personal lines coverage
Wire transfers and financial transaction services
pros: FDIC-insured deposits backed by full faith and credit of U.S. Government
Multiple specialized lending officers including dedicated commercial, agricultural, and mortgage lenders
Three physical branch locations in Minnesota for in-person service and relationship building
Personalized service model with staff members who live and work in served communities
Comprehensive product offerings including mortgages, business loans, debit cards, and online banking
Investment advisory services through Cetera Investment Services partnership
Insurance consulting services available at multiple locations
cons: Limited geographic availability restricted to three Minnesota locations (Chatfield, Preston, Rochester)
No pricing, fee, or APR information disclosed on website for product comparison
Minimal digital innovation or neobanking features evident compared to larger competitors
Limited online presence and marketing materials for company story and differentiation
No mention of mobile banking app or advanced digital banking features

contact.address: 100 Saint Anthony St N, Preston, MN 55965

best_for: Minnesota residents in Chatfield, Preston, or Rochester communities seeking relationship-based banking
Small business owners and agricultural operations needing specialized commercial or ag lending
Customers prioritizing in-person service and community connection over digital-first banking
Individuals seeking mortgage or home loans from local lenders familiar with regional market
diagnosis: F & M Community Bank is best for Minnesota residents in or near Chatfield, Preston, or Rochester seeking traditional banking services with personalized, relationship-based service from local decision-makers. The primary caveat is geographic restriction to three Minnesota locations, making the bank inaccessible for non-local customers and limiting its utility for those seeking regional or national banking accessibility.
typical_results_timeline: Account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions vary by product.
address: 100 Saint Anthony St N, Preston, MN 55965
